title: Luxury Lace Loungewear Catalog Ad AI
sourceTitle: Luxury Lace Loungewear Catalog Ad AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 2:3 luxury lace loungewear catalog fashion advertisement for fictional adult Japanese fashion model with long black hair and soft natural makeup wearing a burgundy lace-trim satin pajama suit with a long robe, fully covered torso, featuring ERIKA / 2026 MODEL / LACE LOUNGEWEAR COLLECTION / ELEGANCE MEETS COMFORT. Subject: fictional adult Japanese fashion model with long black hair and soft natural makeup wearing a burgundy lace-trim satin pajama suit with a long robe, fully covered torso appears as the adult fashion model and product hero, with natural makeup, gentle gaze, realistic skin texture, detailed lace-trim fabric, and tasteful fully covered styling in the stored examples. Scene: bright minimal indoor room with sheer curtains, warm soft window light, luxury editorial catalog spacing, cream background blur and non-explicit loungewear presentation creates the bright minimal indoor catalog setting with sheer curtains, soft warm window light, shallow depth, premium spacing, and a clean elegant commercial mood. Composition: Fixed vertical catalog poster composition: model slightly right of center, left-side space reserved for editorial layout, product outfit clearly visible, serif title and subtitle hierarchy, product line, tagline, small Japanese text, size chart table, and labeled color-palette dots arranged cleanly. Signature Elements: Japanese fashion model mood, long dark hair, soft natural makeup, lace-trim loungewear, bright minimal interior, sheer curtains, left editorial text column, serif catalog typography, size chart table, and color swatches. Style: High-end fashion advertisement poster with premium catalog polish, soft natural beauty styling, luxury fabric detail, bright minimal interior, refined serif editorial layout, and clean commercial fashion atmosphere. Color Palette: Deep burgundy or ivory lace accents, warm cream background, sheer curtain whites, natural skin tones, soft bedding or room neutrals, and labeled palette dots integrated into the layout. Lighting: Soft window light, warm cozy atmosphere, gentle highlights on lace and satin, shallow background blur, and flattering natural face illumination without plastic retouching. Camera: Vertical 2:3 editorial catalog portrait, model slightly right, readable outfit and text area, shallow depth of field, and balanced poster margins. Materials: Lace trim, satin pajama fabric, robe fabric, sheer curtains, soft room textiles, serif print typography, color-palette dots, and clean catalog table lines. Typography: ERIKA / 2026 MODEL / LACE LOUNGEWEAR COLLECTION / ELEGANCE MEETS COMFORT appears as the main title, year/model line, collection name, product/tagline text, small Japanese copy, size-chart table, and color labels; keep all text short, legible, and premium. Restrictions: Use an adult model only. Keep the presentation tasteful and catalog-product focused.
